summary: Core storage interface definitions and SQLite store initialization, entry point for all persistence operations
side_effects: Opens SQLite database file at dbPath
notes: Core package interface. Defines all repository contracts and domain types (Channel, Message, MessageSummary, SyncState). sqliteStore struct implements Store and is responsible for lifecycle: initialization with Open() invokes runMigrations to ensure schema is up-to-date. Matches hints: storage.go is the prerequisite for all other slices. ChannelRepository has dual Create methods (Create and CreateNonTelegram) supporting source_type diversity. MessageSummaryRepository has channel-filtered and unsummarized queries supporting the per-message summaries model introduced in migration 004.
